segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, do you know where I can find laundry detergent?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Aisle seven, near the cleaning supplies.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. And do you carry small packs of rice, or only the big bags?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Small bags are in aisle four, bottom shelf.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. I'm setting up a new place, so I'm buying all the basics at once.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: That first grocery trip is always expensive.

segments.speaker: Cashier
segments.text: Do you have a rewards number with us?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Not yet. Can I sign up later?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, please. Two bags should be enough.
